title: Failed Service
description: A critical systemd unit fails because its ExecStart path is wrong. Inspect the unit, repair the service file, reload systemd, and bring training-agent back online.
tasks: SSH into the lab using the Lab Terminal
Inspect training-agent.service with systemctl status and journalctl
Fix the unit file ExecStart path
Run systemctl daemon-reload and start the service

objectivesPublic.label: SSH into the lab
objectivesPublic.text: Connect from the Lab Terminal using your session credentials.
objectivesPublic.hint: Session SSH details are in the lab credentials section.

objectivesPublic.label: training-agent.service is active
objectivesPublic.text: Diagnose why training-agent.service failed and bring it to an active state.
objectivesPublic.hint: Status and journal output point at the unit file. After editing ExecStart, systemd must reload unit definitions before start.

questions.prompt: Which command reloads systemd unit files after you edit a service?
